name: Single filer at very low income - subsidy caps ISR (MXN 80,000/year)
description: Employee earning MXN 80,000 annually (~MXN 6,667/month). Employment subsidy fully offsets ISR. Only IMSS contributions remain.

sources.description: Calculated using 2026 ISR annual table. Subsidy capped at ISR owed (MXN 4,666 < MXN 6,435 annual subsidy).
